resources.string: Ka whakamahia tēnei hei karapa i ngā waehere QR hei tāpiri pūrere me te whakauru atu ki ngā rōpū, hei tango whakaahua hei whakaputa pikitia kōtaha me te tāhopu kai, hei tautoko i te taura peke AI me te motuhēhēnga ingoa-tūturu, me te whakarato i ētahi anō āhuahira.

Ka whakamahia tēnei mō te tiri, te tikiake i ngā mapi o te papa haupōro, te tāpiri whakaahua, te tāpiri i ngā mata wati, te tiaki i ngā hopu mata, te tiaki wā poto i ngā kōnae oro mō te whakarei ake i te reo, te huri i ngā pikitia kōtaha, te kawemai i ngā ara, me te maha atu.

Ka whakamahia tēnei hei whai haere i ngā whakangungu o waho, hei tiro i ngā mahere papa korowha me ngā tauwāhi o ngā mema o te hapori Hauora, hei takirua pūrere mā te Nihokikorangi, hei tiki pūrongo huarere ki tō pūrere whakamau, hei whiwhi mōhiohio huarere hei whakarato tūtohutanga whakapakari tinana, hei taunaki i ngā takahanga oma taumano e tata ana, me ētahi anō.
Mā runga i tēnei hei tāhopu i te moe, i ngā tāurunga o te rangitaki kai me ngā ingoa kai, anō hoki, hei oko i te turituri mā te whakarei Reo ake me te maha atu mā te tāuru ororongo.

Pānuihia te tūnga karanga me ngā mōhiohio whatunga pūkoro hei whakarato ratonga karanga, pēnei i ngā whakamōhiotanga waea taumai, ngā whakaakoranga whakamutu/ngā oro, ngā kāri whakahohe, me ētahi atu mahi.
E whakamahia ana tēnei hei tūhono pūrere, hei ākiri waea me te maha atu.
Ka riro mā runga i tēnei hei tāpiri me te tukutahi hoapā ohotata me te tautuhi hoapā ohotata mō ngā whakamau.
Ka whakamahia tēnei hei pana i ngā whakamōhiotanga waea tāhapa ki ngā pūrere kua tūhonoa.
Kua tukutahitia ō pūkete korikori tinana. Tirohia ināianei!
Pūkete ECG hōu. Tirohia i te taupānga Hauora.
Ka tukua te pūrere kia tuku i ngā karere SMS ina ākiri ana i ngā waea taumai, ā, ki ētahi atu tauari. Ka pā pea i tēnei ngā utu tāpiri.
Tē taea te wetetakirua te pūrere i konei. Wetetakirua i ngā tautuhinga Nihokikorangi.
E whakamahia ana tēnei hei tuku pāhotanga ki te pūrere.
Ka whakamahia tēnei hei whakarato i ngā whakamahara maramataka mō ngā takahanga pērā i ngā whakapakari tinana, ngā tirotirotanga hauora, me te maha atu.
Ka whakamahia tēnei hei tātai i te tatau hīkoi.
Pūkete ECG hōu. Tirohia i te taupānga Hauora.

Kei te whakamahi koe i te Nihokikorangi hei whakawhiti kōnae ki tō whakamau. Ka taea e koe te whakamahi te Wi-Fi hei whakatere ake i te tukanga. Me whai te whakatere ake Wi-Fi i te whakaaetanga Tauwāhi. Me tuku i Ngā tautuhinga >
E tautoko ana te Hauora Huawei i te whakawhiti kōnae mā WLAN. Me whai tēnei i te whakaaetanga Tauwāhi. Me tuku i Ngā Tautuhinga.
Me tikiake he %1$s (%2$s) hōu me te whakahōu ki tō pūrere. Me haere tonu?
Tikiake ana i te mōkī rauemi whakamau …
I rahua te tikiake mōkī rauemi whakamau.
Kua oti te whakahōu i te mōkī rauemi whakamau
He pūkete pēhanga toto hōu tāu. E pā atu hei tiro i ngā taipitopito.
Kua kitea te pātuki manawa hē, he pātuki tōtata pea. Haere ki te taupānga Hauora mō ētahi taipitopito anō.
Kua kitea he pātuki manawa hē, he ko te whakapae he A-fib. Haere ki te taupānga Hauora mō ētahi taipitopito anō.
Kua kitea te pātuki manawa hē, he mōreatanga pātuki tōtata. Haere ki te taupānga Hauora mō ētahi taipitopito anō.
Kua kitea te pātuki manawa hē, he mōreatanga A-fib. Haere ki te taupānga Hauora mō ētahi taipitopito anō.
Tātari pātuki manawa tīpokapoka ngaru mokowhiti
E wātea ana te pūrongo Māwhiti Hauora
Ka whakamahia tēnei hei karapa, takirua, me te tūhono anō i ngā pūrere.
Pūkete kōpā iatuku hōu. Tirohia i te taupānga Hauora.
Tē taea te tikiake. Pā atu hei ngana anō.
Tē taea te whakahōu. Pā atu hei ngana anō.
Tikiake ana i te whakahōu rauemi whakamau ki te pūrere…
Tē taea te whakawhiti te whakahōu mōkī rauemi whakamau.

Nā reira ka taea e koe te whiwhi waea ki tō mauranga, te tūtatari i ngā mahi me ngā tohuāki ororongo i te wā o ngā waea taumai, te whakahohe kāri, me te whakamahi i ētahi atu āhuahira e pā ana ki te waea.
Kua momotu te pūrere. Hei whakarite kia tika te mahi, whakatuwheratia Hauora Huawei me te tūhono anō.
Parea te wati ki te momotutanga

Huakina te taupānga arā ko Hauora i tāu waea ka haere atu rā ki Ngā pūrere, tīpakona te kāri o te pūrere ka haere ki te Parenga tūhononga wati kia oti ai te tatūnga. Mā tēnei e whakarite nei kia whiwhi ai koe i ngā whakamōhiotanga mō WeChat, mō SMS, mō ngā waeatanga taumai, mō ngā takahanga, mō ērā atu hoki.
Kāore anō tēnei āhuahira e tautokona.
Kia %d mita te tawhiti mai o te pūrere i tāu waea.
E horo ana te nuinga haere ake o ngā kūhuka toto
E horo ana te itinga haere iho o ngā kūhuka toto
Kei te hē te āpiti pūoko
Kei te wateakore rangitahi te pūrere
Tirotiro nei mēnā kua tangoro iho tēnei.
Me āta āpiti tonu mai tēnei.
Taihoa kia tika noa rā anō te pāmahana pūrere.
Kāore anō ngā raraunga kūhuka toto kia wātea. Tirotiro anō ā muri ake.
Kāore ngā raraunga kūhuka toto e wātea i te mea he hapa pūrere. Whakaaro nei ki te whiwhi mea whakakapi.
Kua tae ake tēnei pūrere ki te mutunga o tōna oranga. Me whakakapi tēnei ki tētahi mea hou.
Me aro tonu ki te tere o te pikinga o te taumata kūhuka toto. Kia mataara tonu ki a ia, ka whakaū ki tētahi atu whakamātautau i muri mai.
Me aro tonu ki te hekenga tere o te taumata kūhuka toto. Kia mataara tonu ki a ia, ka whakaū ki tētahi atu whakamātautau i muri mai.
Kua heke tō kūhuka toto ki raro iho i te taumata tino whakamataku o %1$s mmol/L. Tēnā kia aro tonu ki tō taumata huka toto.
Kua heke tō kūhuka toto ki raro iho i te taumata tino whakamataku o %1$s mg/dL. Tēnā kia aro tonu ki tō taumata huka toto.
He iti iho ō kūhuka toto i te uara mōkito tautuhi o te %1$s mmol/L.
He iti iho ō kūhuka toto i te uara mōkito tautuhi o te %1$s mg/dL.
He nui ake ō kūhuka toto i te uara mōrahi tautuhi o te %1$s mmol/L.
He nui ake ō kūhuka toto i te uara mōrahi tautuhi o te %1$s mg/dL.
Kia mau ki tō pūrere i ia rā kia whiwhi ai koe i tāhopu tino whakaoti mō tō hauora tinana.
Kāore i whakahoutia ngā raraunga mō %1$s ngā rā. Whakatuwherahia te Hauora Huawei, ā, whakawhāitihia anō te pūrere kia whakahoutia ō raraunga.
Kāore i whakahoutia ngā raraunga mō %1$s ngā haora. Whakatuwherahia te Hauora Huawei, ā, whakawhāitihia anō te pūrere kia whakahoutia ō raraunga.
Mau i tō pae i ia rā kia whiwhi ai i ngā raraunga tonutanga me kitenga tika ake mō tō tinana.
Kei raro iho i te %2$s te pūhiko %1$s. Me whakahiko.
Kāore i whakahoutia ngā raraunga mō %1$s rā. Whakatuwherahia te Hauora Huawei, ā, whakawhāitihia anō te pūrere kia whakahoutia ō raraunga.
Mau i tō wati i ia rā kia whiwhi ai i ngā raraunga tonutanga me kitenga tika ake mō tō tinana.
Kāore i whakahoutia ngā raraunga mō %1$s ngā rā. Whakatuwherahia te Hauora Huawei, ā, whakawhāitihia anō te pūrere kia whakahoutia ō raraunga.
%1$s kei raro te pūhiko %2$s. Me whakahiko.

Ka whakamahia tēnei hei whai haere i ngā whakangungu o waho, hei tiro i ngā mahere papa korowha me ngā tauwāhi o ngā mema o te hapori Hauora, hei takirua pūrere mā te Nihokikorangi, hangaia ngā kāri ī-pūtāhui, tāhopu ngā whakahohenga pūrere, hei tiki pūrongo huarere ki tō pūrere whakamau, hei whiwhi mōhiohio huarere hei whakarato tūtohutanga whakapakari tinana, hei taunaki i ngā takahanga oma taumano e tata ana, me ētahi anō.
Kua oti i a koe tō whāinga hīkoinga mō te rā
Takiuru ki tō HUAWEI ID i Hauora
Nā ngā whakahōu pūnaha, me tuku anō ngā whakaaetanga i roto i te taupānga Hauora kia uru atu ai ki ngā āhuahira katoa.
He āhua poto noa ō haora tū katoa. Tirohia ngā taipitopito >>
Me whai te taupānga Hauora i te whakaaetanga Korikori tinana.
Tirohia ngā taipitopito o te haora Takahuri
He āhua poto noa tō tapeke haora takahuri. Tirohia ngā taipitopito >>
Kite wawetia he raraunga tatau hīkoi onāianei, ā, nōnā tata nei.
